untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit identification of broadening top pattern formation (upper/lower trend lines, formation height, old high reference point), pattern structure detection, and reversal at specific trendline levels. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and trend line calculation not available in allowed indicators. The signal is inherently pattern-based and cannot be reduced to single-bar technical indicator conditions.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: entry_long uses price upturn (close > prev_close) + proximity to support (s1). Entry_short uses proximity to resistance (r1). Exit_long targets old high (approximated as pivot). Exit_short targets downside target (s2). Stop loss set to formation_height (2.13). However, this is a weak approximation—true implementation requires candlestick pattern recognition library for broadening top detection and trendline identification.
